best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-class-001 title: verify person class attributes and operations module: person source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: - name: john doe - age: 30 - gender: male test steps: 1. create a person object with name "john doe", age 30, and gender "male". 2. get the name using getname() method. 3. set the age to 31 using setage(31). 4. get the updated age using getage() method. 5. get the gender using getgender() method. expected result: - step 1: object created successfully. - step 2: name returned as "john doe". - step 3: age updated to 31. - step 4: age returned as 31. - step 5: gender returned as "male".
